summary: Restyle the rust-diffforge Files view to use a compact VS Code-like explorer treatment with codicon-based folder and file-type icons.

review_items.summary: The Files view renders denser Explorer rows, VS Code-like sidebar chrome, and type-aware codicon file glyphs while preserving read-only workspace browsing.
The React app shell imports the VS Code Codicons asset package and maps workspace file extensions to compact explorer icons.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, or data access change is required.

patches.summary: Add the @vscode/codicons dependency for VS Code-like explorer glyphs.
Restyle the Files view and render type-aware codicon glyphs for explorer rows and preview headers.

compatibility.notes: The change is limited to the authenticated desktop Files view styling and frontend asset dependency.
